rationale: The stated field 'condensed-matter physics (the integer quantum Hall effect)' is a genuinely different specific field from the reference's 'mathematics (algebraic topology)', so field_match fails. The stated mechanism (K-theoretic gap labelling: a trace on the translation crossed-product C*-algebra evaluated on K_0 forcing discrete topological labels) denotes the same specific machinery as the reference (forming the groupoid of translational/dynamical equivalences and taking its cohomological invariant), since the crossed product is that translation groupoid's algebra and the gap-labelling theorem ties the trace on K_0 to the dynamical cohomology, so mechanism_match holds; overall_equivalent is their AND and is false.
